title: Denim Retention Campaign
description: As a growth engineer, led technical implementation and content development for a large-scale denim retention campaign targeting previous-year buyers. Engineered data integration systems, built audience segmentation workflows across CMS platforms, and architected multi-channel deployment spanning email, push notifications, in-app messaging, and media content to maximize retention and revenue.
shortDescription: Multi-channel retention campaign targeting previous-year denim buyers across email, push, in-app, and media.
technologies: HTML, CSS, Email Marketing, Responsive Design, Cross-platform Testing, Push Notifications, In-App Messaging, Data Management, Audience Segmentation, CMS Integration

title: First Time Buyer Orchestration
description: As a growth engineer bridging marketing and technology, contributed to an orchestration project spanning multiple teams within martech and engineering departments. Worked on the first-time buyer journey automation system for both Abercrombie & Hollister brands, combining technical infrastructure with marketing strategy to drive repeat purchase behavior.
shortDescription: Cross-team orchestration automating the first-time buyer journey for Abercrombie & Hollister brands.
technologies: HTML, CSS, Email Marketing, Responsive Design, Cross-platform Testing, Push Notifications

title: Email Campaign Execution
description: Engineered responsive HTML email templates and campaign workflows for Abercrombie Adults brand, ensuring cross-platform compatibility across 1M+ subscribers. Combined technical development with growth optimization strategies to maximize deliverability, engagement, and conversion rates.
shortDescription: Responsive HTML email campaigns for Abercrombie Adults reaching 1M+ subscribers.
technologies: HTML, CSS, Email Marketing, Responsive Design, Cross-platform Testing

title: Email Campaign Execution
description: Engineered responsive HTML email templates and campaign workflows for Hollister Brand, ensuring cross-platform compatibility across 1M+ subscribers. Applied growth engineering principles to optimize campaign performance, segment targeting, and deliverability for maximum business impact.
shortDescription: Responsive HTML email campaigns for Hollister Brand reaching 1M+ subscribers.
technologies: HTML, CSS, Email Marketing, Responsive Design, Cross-platform Testing

title: Promotional Push Content Optimization
description: As a growth engineer, built dynamic push notification systems for Abercrombie Adults & Kids, & HCO brands, ensuring cross-platform compatibility across 1M+ subscribers. Engineered coordinated timing workflows across email + app push channels to deliver a unified brand experience that maximizes engagement and conversion.
shortDescription: Dynamic push notification systems for A&F and HCO brands coordinated across email and app channels.
technologies: HTML, CSS, Email Marketing, Responsive Design, Cross-platform Testing, Push Notifications

title: Internal Dev Team Tooling
description: As a growth engineer, I identified a team-wide productivity bottleneck and built an internal Chrome extension with vanilla JavaScript to streamline our dev team's campaign workflow. The tool provides one-click access to team resources, pre-validated CMS scripting templates, brand-specific email headers, and localized translations — reducing errors and speeding up campaign development.
shortDescription: Chrome extension I built to speed up the dev team's workflow with one-click CMS snippets and quick links.
technologies: JavaScript, HTML, CSS, Chrome Extension APIs, Manifest V3, Clipboard API, Vite

title: HCO X NCAA
description: Led growth engineering execution for the Hollister x NCAA partnership by developing campaign-ready email and push experiences, building segmented audience workflows, and supporting ad hoc event messaging. Owned technical implementation across channels to align partnership storytelling with precise targeting, including a UT alma mater event push activation.
shortDescription: Hollister x NCAA partnership campaign work across email, push, and targeted segmentation, including a UT ad hoc event activation.
technologies: HTML, CSS, Email Marketing, Push Notifications, Audience Segmentation, Data Management, Cross-platform Testing, Cordial

title: AF X NFL
description: Led growth engineering execution for an AF x NFL collaboration campaign by building and launching email and push experiences tied to key football moments. Highlighted the CD LAMB event with zip code-based audience segmentation to target nearby fans, resulting in a successful Fort Worth location activation.
shortDescription: AF x NFL collaboration campaign featuring CD LAMB event targeting with zip code segmentation and a successful Fort Worth activation.
technologies: HTML, CSS, Email Marketing, Push Notifications, Audience Segmentation, Zip Code Targeting, Data Management, Cross-platform Testing, Cordial
